description_long: This is a single black leather lace-up boot with a high ankle and brogue detailing along the seams and toe cap. The boot features a rounded toe, visible stitching, and decorative perforations typical of brogue shoes. The laces are black and threaded through metal eyelets, with the tongue and collar lined in a lighter beige material. The sole is thick and rugged, likely made of rubber, providing durability and traction for urban environments. The boot shows some creasing and minor scuffing, indicating moderate use but overall good structural integrity. The design is both functional and stylish, suitable for city streets and casual or semi-formal wear.
description: A black leather high-ankle lace-up boot with brogue detailing, rugged sole, and beige lining. Shows minor wear and is suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brogue detailing, high ankle, and beige lining inside the collar.
description_view_1: Front angle highlighting the rounded toe, lacing system, and decorative perforations.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile emphasizing the smooth leather surface and stitching details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel, back seam, and partial view of the inner lining.
